    EDITORS IN CHIEF: Dr. = Felicia Goodrum and Dr. Stacey Schultz-Cherry

    Co-Editors in Chief

    =20
    Dr.= Felicia Goodrum

    Editor in Chief (2027) | Geisel School of Medicine at Dartmouth

    Felicia Goodrum is a professor in the Department of Microbiology and= Immunology at the Geisel School of Medicine at Dartmouth. Dr. Goodrum's la= boratory focuses on virus-host interactions at the latency-replication deci= sion.

    Dr. Stacey Schultz-Cherry

    Editor in Chief (2027) | St. = Jude Children=E2=80=99s Research Hospital

    =20

    Stacey Schultz-Cherry is a full member (professor) in the Department= of Infectious Diseases at St. Jude Children=E2=80=99s Research Hospital. D= r. Schultz-Cherry's lab has refined its focus on understanding influenza vi= rus and astrovirus pathogenesis in vulnerable populations with the goal of = improving therapeutic options.

    =20 =20 =20
